name: Ragin' Cajun Party Mix
recipeIngredient: 1 bag reduced-fat gourmet microwave popcorn (3.5 ounces)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine the chili powder, onion powder, garlic powder, salt, and cayenne pepper.
Sprinkle the mixture evenly over the popped popcorn, discarding any unpopped kernels.
2. In a large bowl, toss the coated popcorn with the mini pretzels and toasted corn cereal squares,
mixing until everything is well combined.
